title: 10 Signs You're Actually Leading Like Christ
caption:
Leadership isn't a title. It's a pattern of behavior — and most men who have the title don't have the pattern.

Christ's leadership model: go first into the cost, protect the weak, tell the truth when it costs you, be correctable, be the same man in private.

Not dominate. Not perform. Not manage impressions.

Save this. One of these will convict you. That's the one to start on.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #manofgod #godlymen #christianity #scripture #discipleship
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
